creator: bsam@ipt.ru
text:
Hi!


The port is not fetchable:
-----
# make fetch
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> jigdo-bin-0.7.3.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://atterer.net/jigdo/.
fetch: http://atterer.net/jigdo/jigdo-bin-0.7.3.tar.bz2: Moved Temporarily
-----

But if I change MASTER_SITES from current http://atterer.net/jigdo/
to http://www.atterer.net/jigdo/ then:
-----
# make fetch
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> jigdo-bin-0.7.3.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.atterer.net/jigdo/.
jigdo-bin-0.7.3.tar.bz2                       100% of  994 kB  507 kBps
-----

Do you approve this change?


WBR
-- 
bsam
